headline: 250 years of American independence: A disenchanted anniversary
subhead: 'America 250' (13/13). Trump's two terms in office are undermining national cohesion. The ideal of equality enshrined in the founding documents is a distant prospect, the system of checks and balances has cracked and any reform seems impossible. Americans' belief in their shared history is eroding. Even the nature of the system of government is a matter of debate. But historians are trying to put things into perspective.

headline: 'Many rescuers left without helping us': After the earthquakes in Venezuela, a family's despair as they dig through the rubble with their bare hands
Devastating heatwave leaves France's wildlife in crisis
Pope urges US to recommit to tradition of welcoming migrants on nation's 250th anniversary
subhead: On the eve of the 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence, history's first US-born pope focused on America's tradition of welcoming migrants, whom he referred to as part of the 'noble vision' of the Founding Fathers.

headline: Khamenei funeral ceremonies begin in Iran
subhead: Iran's Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, was killed on February 28 during Israeli and US airstrikes on Iran.

headline: With 'Confessions II,' Madonna celebrates the pleasures of partying, blending glittering hedonism and hypnotic power
subhead: By returning to the dance floor, the American singer finds her comfort zone again on her 15th album and, in the process, reveals a more vulnerable side.

headline: The incredible success of the de Gaulle biopic 'reflects the paradox embodied by the hero of Free France'
subhead: The first installment of La Bataille de Gaulle, released on June 3, got off to a disappointing start before box office numbers soared, driven by a historic heatwave and word of mouth. This is especially significant, as the film resonates with current events, writes Le Monde's culture columnist.

'Which side were you on during Brexit? Every candidate in the French presidential election should answer this question'
subhead: The lessons from the UK's unprecedented vote to leave the European Union 10 years ago have been all too quickly forgotten, writes Le Monde columnist Alain Frachon.

headline: The Christian right's charge to rewrite American history
subhead: 'America 250' (12/13). Barack Obama's election in 2008 led to greater recognition of the role of minorities in nation-building. But the conservative backlash soon followed. Leading the 'patriotic' counter-offensive, Donald Trump has received support from the influential Hillsdale College.

headline: Early heatwaves are devastating French agriculture and leaving farmers helpless
subhead: Scorched crops, decimated livestock and double-digit production drops: as farmers take stock of the effects of extreme heat, they fear the worst is yet to come.

headline: The shadows of an American anniversary
Timothy Snyder, historian: 'Trump's war against Iran shows that evil and folly can march hand in hand'
250 years of American independence: 'Enslaved and freed Black people were not merely witnesses to the Atlantic Revolutions, they were active participants'
